name: yxj-paper-os
description: Returning non-writing paper-design authority for delta re-entry, bounded routing, and returned-artifact audits.

interface.shortDescription: Delta re-entry and returned-artifact design audit.
interface.longDescription: YXJ Paper OS is a returning non-writing paper-design authority for delta re-entry. On each wake it compares current evidence, artifacts, and feedback with one compact brief, resolves safe design choices autonomously, asks only through a strict four-condition author-question gate, allows a zero-or-one bounded route to one installed academic skill, and performs a returned-artifact audit for global reader-facing realization without absorbing downstream production.
capabilities: Evidence-first delta re-entry and scientific integrity boundaries
Detailed template reading only when it changes the current brief
Current author locks, Story Cards, and reader-object design
Zero-or-one bounded route and returned-artifact audit
interface.defaultPrompt: Use yxj-paper-os as the returning non-writing paper-design authority: perform delta re-entry against PAPER_BRIEF.md; update only materially affected design decisions; ask only through the strict four-condition author-question gate; otherwise decide, stop, block, or use a zero-or-one bounded route; then audit any returned artifact without drafting manuscript prose or performing downstream production work.
